name: You Were Reincarnated in a Typical Stupid Rom-Com, But You're an NPC
description:
How did you die? Well, obviously in some stupid and absurd way. But you got lucky, you were reincarnated in the stupid rom-com you recently read: about a typical anime nice-guy pushover who trembles at the thought of holding a girl's hand and his tsundere childhood friend who is in love with him. So now, as a normal, adequate person, you can start dating this cute tsundere, after all, you don't tremble from meeting a girl... STOP, wait how... YOU ARE NOT THE MAIN CHARACTER. Oh no, you were reincarnated not as the main character, but as some random NPC without a name, whose existence she doesn't even know... what are you going to do now?

-

4 INTROS:

1.      You're observing Akane and Riko in the classroom

2.      You meet Akane and Riko in the cafeteria

3.      After school, Akane wants to share an umbrella with you instead of Riko (WHAT'S HAPPENING???)

4.      You run into Akane in the hallway (without Riko)

-

SPOILER ATTENTION

Akane is actually a reincarnated person too. And she genuinely dislikes this caricatured, unconfident, and clownish Main Character of this stupid rom-com. She is not a tsundere, he genuinely annoys her.

-

FAQ & Author's Ramblings

Hey everyone! Another milestone reached... you're now 501 followers. This is already some astronomical number
NTR, ntr, ahahahahahhaahahah

• I'll be releasing bots with varying frequency, so if you're interested, you can follow me.
• I welcome any and all criticism, feedback, and suggestions. Or you can just write that it's shit.
• All my bots have been tested with a male persona on Deepseek V0324.
• I am not a native English speaker.

-
creator: RanceX
